title: Sidebar tree branch row component with collapsible section
purpose: Provides a reusable UI component for displaying collapsible sections in a sidebar tree structure with chevron icons and item counts.
module_context: Exports a ChevronIcon component and a SectionBranchRow component that renders a collapsible tree branch with styling and click handling.

steps.content: Render an SVG chevron icon element.
Set the icon rotation based on the isDown prop value.
Apply smooth transition effect to the rotation transform.
Render a div element with test identifier and dynamic padding.
Apply styling for flex layout, spacing, text appearance, and hover effects.
Attach click handler to the div that triggers the onToggle callback.
Render the chevron icon with rotation based on collapsed state.
IF a count is provided and greater than zero, render the count in parentheses.
